title: Sign in with valid credentials and land on dashboard
description: Verifies admin can sign in and sees the dashboard with KPI cards (Total Devices, Active Test Runs, Completed This Week, Pass Rate) and Recent Test Sessions table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill 'admin' into the username field
Fill 'SLLui7QVK3fTrzmdzc0ygXkZ25t9LStd' into the password field
Click the Sign In button
Verify the dashboard page loads with KPI summary cards visible
Verify 'Recent Test Sessions' table is displayed

title: Reject login with invalid password and show error toast
description: Verifies entering wrong password shows 'Invalid credentials' error toast and user stays on /login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill 'admin' into the username field
Fill 'wrongpassword123' into the password field
Click the Sign In button
Verify 'Invalid credentials' error message is shown
Verify user remains on the /login page

title: Add a static IP device and verify it appears in inventory
description: Login, navigate to /devices, click Add Device, fill IP Address (192.168.50.10), Hostname (Camera-Lobby-01), Manufacturer (Axis), click Add Device, verify new device row appears in table.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /devices
Click the 'Add Device' button
Fill '192.168.50.10' into the IP Address field
Fill 'Camera-Lobby-01' into the Hostname field
Fill 'Axis' into the Manufacturer field
Click the 'Add Device' submit button in the form
Verify 'Camera-Lobby-01' appears in the devices table

title: Open device detail page and view device info sections
description: Login, navigate to /devices, click on a device name link in the table to open its detail page at /devices/:id. Verify device info fields (IP, hostname, manufacturer, model), test history section, and open ports section are visible.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /devices
Click on a device name link in the devices table
Verify the device detail page loads at /devices/:id
Verify device info fields (IP Address, Hostname, Manufacturer) are displayed
Verify a Test History section is visible on the device detail page

title: Edit device fields inline on device detail page
description: Open a device detail page, click the Edit button, modify the Location field to 'Building A Floor 3', save changes, verify the updated location is shown.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /devices
Click on a device name to open its detail page
Click the Edit button to enable inline editing
Change the Location field to 'Building A Floor 3'
Click Save to save the changes
Verify 'Building A Floor 3' is displayed as the device location

title: Search devices by hostname in the devices list
description: Login, navigate to /devices, type a device hostname into the search input, verify the table filters to show only matching devices.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /devices
Type a known device name into the search input field
Verify the devices table filters to show only devices matching the search term

title: Create a new project with full metadata
description: Login, navigate to /projects, click New Project, fill Name ('Office Renovation Q3'), Description, Client Name ('Electracom'), Location, click Create Project, verify project card appears.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /projects
Click the 'New Project' button
Fill 'Office Renovation Q3' into the Project Name field
Fill 'Quarterly office network upgrade project' into the Description field
Fill 'Electracom' into the Client field
Click 'Create Project' button to save
Verify 'Office Renovation Q3' project card appears in the project list

title: View devices filtered by project
description: After creating a project, click the project name link to navigate to /devices?project_id=X and verify the filtered device list for that project loads.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /projects
Click on a project name link (e.g. the device count link) to navigate to the filtered devices view
Verify the Devices page loads and shows devices filtered by the selected project

title: Create a test run and select device and template
description: Login, navigate to /test-runs, click New Test Run, select a device from the dropdown, select a template from the dropdown, click Create Run, verify the new run appears in the list.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /test-runs
Click the 'New Test Run' button
Select a device from the Device dropdown
Select a template from the Template dropdown
Click 'Create Run' button
Verify the new test run appears in the test runs list

title: View completed test run detail with test results
description: Login, navigate to /test-runs, click on a completed test run to open /test-runs/:id, verify test results sidebar with individual test names, verdicts (pass/fail/manual), and engineer notes section are visible.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /test-runs
Click on a completed test run from the list
Verify the test run detail page loads at /test-runs/:id
Verify individual test results are listed with verdict status (pass/fail/pending)
Verify the engineer notes section is visible

title: Filter test runs by status (Active, Review, Done)
description: Login, navigate to /test-runs, click on the status filter tabs (Active, In Review, Completed), verify the list updates to show only runs with the selected status.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /test-runs
Click the 'Done' or 'Completed' status filter tab
Verify only completed test runs are shown in the list

title: Browse test template library and create a new template
description: Login, navigate to /templates, click New Template, fill template name ('Custom Security Scan'), browse the universal test library, select 3+ tests using checkboxes, click Save, verify template appears in the list.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /templates
Click the 'New Template' or 'Create Template' button
Fill 'Custom Security Scan' into the template name field
Select at least 3 tests from the test library checkboxes
Click Save to create the template
Verify 'Custom Security Scan' template appears in the templates list

title: Create a port whitelist with entries
description: Login, navigate to /whitelists, click New Whitelist, fill name ('Lab Whitelist'), add entries (Port 443 TCP HTTPS TLS1.2+, Port 22 TCP SSH OpenSSH8+), save, verify it appears in the list.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /whitelists
Click 'New Whitelist' button
Fill 'Lab Whitelist' into the whitelist name field
Add an entry: Port 443, Protocol TCP, Service HTTPS
Save the whitelist
Verify 'Lab Whitelist' appears in the whitelists list

title: Duplicate an existing whitelist
description: Login, navigate to /whitelists, find an existing whitelist, click the Duplicate button, verify a copy of the whitelist appears in the list with 'Copy' appended to name.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /whitelists
Click the Duplicate button on an existing whitelist
Verify a duplicated whitelist appears in the list

title: Admin creates a new user with engineer role
description: Login as admin, navigate to /admin, click Create User, fill username ('test_engineer'), email ('engineer@test.com'), password ('TestPass123!'), select role 'engineer', click Create, verify user appears in users table.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /admin
Click the 'Create User' button
Fill 'test_engineer_ts' into the username field
Fill 'engineer_ts@test.com' into the email field
Fill 'TestPass123!' into the password field
Select 'engineer' from the role dropdown
Click 'Create User' to submit the form
Verify 'test_engineer_ts' appears in the users table

title: Admin changes a user role via inline select
description: Login as admin, navigate to /admin, find a user in the table, change their role from 'engineer' to 'reviewer' using the inline role dropdown, verify the role updates.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /admin
Find a user with 'engineer' role in the users table
Change their role to 'reviewer' using the inline role dropdown
Verify the user's role is updated to 'reviewer' in the table

title: Admin views system status tab
description: Login as admin, navigate to /admin, click the System tab, verify system health info is displayed including API status, Database status, and tools sidecar status.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /admin
Click the 'System' tab
Verify system health information is displayed (API, Database status)

title: View audit log and filter by action type
description: Login as admin, navigate to /audit-log, verify audit log entries are listed. Use the action filter dropdown to filter by 'auth.login' events, verify the table updates to show only login events.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /audit-log
Verify audit log entries are displayed in a table
Select a specific action type filter (e.g. login events)
Verify the audit log table filters to show only the selected action type

title: Export audit log as CSV
description: Login as admin, navigate to /audit-log, click the Export CSV button, verify the download starts (a file download is triggered).

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /audit-log
Click the 'Export CSV' button
Verify a CSV file download is triggered or a success message appears

title: Generate an Excel report from a completed test run
description: Login, navigate to /reports, select a completed test run from the dropdown, select 'Excel' format, click Generate, verify the report download starts or a success message appears.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /reports
Select a completed test run from the test run dropdown
Select 'Excel' as the report format
Click the 'Generate Report' button
Verify the report is generated and a download link or success message appears

title: Settings - Edit profile name and email
description: Login, navigate to /settings, update the Full Name field to 'Admin User Updated', update email to 'admin_updated@electracom.co.uk', click Save, verify success toast 'Profile updated'.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /settings
Clear and fill 'Admin User Updated' into the Full Name field
Click the Save button for profile changes
Verify a success message like 'Profile updated' appears

title: Settings - Change password with complexity validation
description: Login, navigate to /settings, click Change Password section, enter current password, enter new password that meets complexity (8+ chars, upper+lower+digit), confirm new password, click Change Password, verify success.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /settings
Find the Change Password section
Fill current password 'SLLui7QVK3fTrzmdzc0ygXkZ25t9LStd' into current password field
Fill 'NewSecure2026Pass!' into new password and confirm password fields
Click 'Change Password' button
Verify a success message appears confirming password was changed

title: Settings - Toggle dark/light theme
description: Login, navigate to /settings, find the Appearance section, click the theme toggle to switch between light and dark mode, verify the page theme changes visually.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /settings
Find the Appearance or Theme section
Click the theme toggle switch
Verify the page theme changes (dark mode or light mode toggles)

title: Settings - Update report branding company name
description: Login, navigate to /settings, find the Report Branding section, update Company Name to 'TestCo International', click Save, verify success message.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /settings
Find the Report Branding section
Clear and fill 'TestCo International' into the Company Name field
Click Save for branding settings
Verify a success message appears confirming branding was updated

title: Create a device profile with fingerprint rules
description: Login, navigate to /device-profiles, click New Profile, fill name ('IP Camera Standard'), manufacturer ('Axis'), select category, save, verify profile appears in list.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /device-profiles
Click 'New Profile' button
Fill 'IP Camera Standard' into the Profile Name field
Fill 'Axis' into the Manufacturer field
Click Create Profile button to save
Verify 'IP Camera Standard' appears in the device profiles list

title: View the landing page as unauthenticated user
description: Navigate to the app root / without being logged in. Verify the landing page shows the product name 'EDQ', a 'Sign In' link/button, and marketing content.

steps.description: Navigate to / (root URL) without being logged in
Verify the landing page is displayed with product branding
Verify a 'Sign In' link or button is visible

title: Navigate through all main sidebar links
description: Login as admin, systematically click each sidebar navigation link (Dashboard, Projects, Devices, Test Runs, Templates, Whitelists, Reports, Review, Settings) and verify each page loads without error.

steps.description: Login as admin
Click 'Projects' in the sidebar and verify the page loads
Click 'Devices' in the sidebar and verify the page loads
Click 'Test Runs' in the sidebar and verify the page loads
Click 'Templates' in the sidebar and verify the page loads
Click 'Reports' in the sidebar and verify the page loads
Verify all pages loaded without errors and displayed their main content

title: Add an authorized network CIDR range
description: Login as admin, navigate to /authorized-networks, click Add Network, fill CIDR '10.0.0.0/24' with label 'Office LAN', save, verify it appears in the list.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /authorized-networks
Click 'Add Network' button
Fill '10.0.0.0/24' into the CIDR field
Fill 'Office LAN' into the label field
Click Save to add the network
Verify '10.0.0.0/24' network appears in the authorized networks list

title: Dashboard shows KPI cards with correct data types
description: Login, land on dashboard, verify four KPI cards are visible: Total Devices (number), Active Test Runs (number), Completed This Week (number), Pass Rate (percentage). Verify Recent Test Sessions table has columns.

steps.description: Login as admin and land on the dashboard
Verify 'Total Devices' KPI card is visible with a numeric value
Verify 'Active Test Runs' KPI card is visible
Verify 'Completed This Week' KPI card is visible
Verify 'Recent Test Sessions' table with rows is visible

title: View review queue page as admin
description: Login as admin, navigate to /review, verify the review queue page loads and shows a table or empty state message for test runs awaiting review.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to /review
Verify the Review Queue page loads with either a table of pending reviews or an empty state message
